nasb.text: I have also spoken to the prophets, And I gave numerous visions, And through the prophets I gave parables.

esv.text: I spoke to the prophets; it was I who multiplied visions, and through the prophets gave parables.

cnv.text: 我曾對先知說話， 加添許多異象； 又藉先知說比喻。

ccb.text: 我曾对先知讲话，赐给他们许多异象， 借他们用比喻警告你们。”
